creator: nospam@ofloo.org
text:
This crap happens to me really often lately using 6.3-RELEASE-p1 it 
happend to me from 6.x it has to do with SMP 1 cpu freezes and the whole 
system freezes, ..

It started from the moment i started using certificates to authenticate 
to sshd and stf interface for 6to4.

Regards, ..
